scripts.test: npm run test:brand && npm run test:lifecycle && npm run test:sidebar-layout && npm run test:source-actions && npm run test:button-interaction
scripts.test:brand: rm -rf .tmp-test && tsc --target ES2023 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --types node --strict --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-test tests/brand.test.ts && node .tmp-test/tests/brand.test.js
scripts.test:lifecycle: rm -rf .tmp-test && tsc --target ES2023 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --types node --strict --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-test tests/lifecycle.test.ts && node .tmp-test/tests/lifecycle.test.js
scripts.test:sidebar-layout: rm -rf .tmp-test && tsc --target ES2023 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --types node --strict --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-test tests/sidebar-layout.test.ts && node .tmp-test/sidebar-layout.test.js
scripts.test:source-actions: rm -rf .tmp-test && tsc --target ES2023 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --types node --strict --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-test tests/source-actions.test.ts && node .tmp-test/tests/source-actions.test.js
scripts.test:button-interaction: rm -rf .tmp-test && tsc --target ES2023 --module NodeNext --moduleResolution NodeNext --types node --strict --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --outDir .tmp-test tests/button-interaction.test.ts && node .tmp-test/button-interaction.test.js
